name: Emerald Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the gelatin in hot water.
2. Chill until slightly thick.
3. Combine shredded cucumber and grated onion; drain well.
4. Add cream-style cottage cheese, mayonnaise, and blanched almonds to the dissolved gelatin mixture.
5. Fold ingredients into the chilled gelatin mixture.
6. Pour into an 8-inch square dish and chill until firm.
7. To serve, cut into squares and garnish with endive or parsley.
